scripts.build:ios: node scripts/preflight.js --platform ios --for build && eas build --platform ios --profile production
scripts.build:android: node scripts/preflight.js --platform android --for build && eas build --platform android --profile production
scripts.build:all: node scripts/preflight.js --platform all --for build && eas build --platform all --profile production
scripts.submit:ios: node scripts/preflight.js --platform ios --for submit && eas submit --platform ios --profile production
scripts.submit:android: node scripts/preflight.js --platform android --for submit && eas submit --platform android --profile production
scripts.submit:all: node scripts/preflight.js --platform all --for submit && eas submit --platform all --profile production
